topbar.message: Community-first solar design, installation, financing support and service.
hero.subtitle: Lower bills. More control. A solar system designed around your property, usage and long-term goals, not a one-size-fits-all sales pitch.
hero.badgeText: From bill review and custom design to permits, installation, utility approval and monitoring.
metrics.title: Numbers that help you make a better decision.
metrics.subtitle: Every property is different. These figures are planning ranges, not guarantees. Your proposal should be based on verified usage, roof conditions and utility rules.
metrics.savingsNote: Varies by site, plan and usage
audience.title: Solar built for homes, organizations and growing businesses.
audience.subtitle: One contractor relationship, multiple energy paths: rooftop solar, storage readiness, EV charging, carports and long-term system support.
audience.homeownersDesc: Custom residential systems designed around comfort, value and predictable energy costs.
audience.commercialDesc: Reduce operating exposure and plan scalable power for facilities and portfolios.
audience.churchesDesc: Energy strategies that protect more of the budget for ministry and community impact.
audience.nonprofitsDesc: Mission-aware solar planning with support for grants, incentives and financing pathways.
audience.manufacturingDesc: Power planning for high-demand operations, carports and future fleet electrification.
why.title: Local guidance without the pressure fog.
why.subtitle: We translate solar into a practical property decision: what fits, what it costs, what it may save, what approvals are required and what support continues after activation.
services.title: From the first bill review to the years after installation.
services.residentialDesc: Right-sized rooftop systems engineered around usage, roof geometry, shade and ownership goals.
services.commercialDesc: Facility-scale solar strategies for operating cost control, resilience planning and ESG commitments.
services.nonprofitsDesc: Solar pathways tailored to mission-driven organizations, churches and community institutions.
services.analysisDesc: Usage review, interval-data analysis and practical opportunities to reduce avoidable consumption.
services.evDesc: Prepare homes, workplaces and parking assets for electric vehicles and shaded solar generation.
services.supportDesc: System health checks, performance visibility, upgrades, diagnostics and service coordination.
services.designSubtitle: Before installation begins, Gen 13 Solar uses detailed planning tools to help forecast performance, evaluate savings potential and design a system around the property.
services.designClosing: With this level of analysis, you do not have to rely on guesses. You can understand how your system is expected to perform before installation begins.
calculator.title: Turn your current bill into a planning conversation.
calculator.subtitle: Adjust your monthly electricity bill and approximate sun exposure. The calculator offers a rough educational estimate, then Gen 13 Solar can validate it with real site and utility data.
calculator.disclaimer: Educational estimate only. Actual production, incentives, utility rates, system price, financing and savings vary. A site assessment and utility analysis are required before any proposal.
process.title: Five clear steps from curiosity to clean power.
process.step1Desc: We review usage, goals and baseline utility costs.
process.step2Desc: A system is modeled for roof, load and performance.
process.step3Desc: Qualified professionals install and document the system.
process.step4Desc: Permits and interconnection steps are coordinated.
process.step5Desc: Your system is activated, monitored and supported.
projects.title: Work designed for real roofs and real energy goals.
projects.subtitle: A small preview of residential and property-scale installations. Final project descriptions should be paired with verified client permissions and production data.
testimonials.title: Clear communication is part of the installation.
faq.title: Solar answers without the sunshine smoke.
faq.subtitle: These are general answers. Your system should be evaluated using your actual property, electric usage and utility requirements.
cta.title: Stop renting all your electricity. Start building energy independence.
cta.subtitle: Request a no-pressure review of your electric bill, roof, goals and available financing paths.
contact.heroSubtitle: Share your property details and goals. We'll respond with clear next steps — no pressure, no vague promises.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your property, goals, or questions...
contact.formConsent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your inquiry. No spam, ever.
contact.directSubtitle: Reach out directly — we're here to answer questions and guide you through options.
contact.faqTitle: Common questions before you reach out
contact.faq1: How soon can a project start?
contact.faq1Answer: Timelines vary by system size, permit load, and utility queue. After a bill review and site assessment, we can give you a realistic range.
contact.faq2Answer: Yes. Permitting, utility interconnection, and inspection coordination are included in our process.
contact.faq3Answer: We support multiple financing paths and can walk through options that fit your budget and goals.
contact.mapSubtitle: Based in Dallas–Fort Worth, serving surrounding communities across North Texas.
thankyou.title: Thank you for reaching out!
thankyou.subtitle: We've received your message and will be in touch within 1–2 business days.
error.title: Page not found
error.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
team.title: Meet the people behind Gen 13 Solar
team.subtitle: A local team focused on clear guidance, clean installations, and long-term support.
team.person1.name: Jorge Feliz
team.person1.bio: Jorge founded Gen 13 Solar to help homeowners, businesses, churches and nonprofits make confident energy decisions through honest guidance, careful design and long-term value.
team.person2.name: Maximo A. Crispin
team.person2.bio: Maximo helps clients understand their energy options through personal, professional and transparent guidance throughout the solar process.
homeDesignAnalysis.title: Professional solar design, not guesswork.
homeDesignAnalysis.subtitle: Gen 13 Solar uses detailed design analysis to help clients understand performance, savings potential and system fit before installation begins.
founder.title: About Jorge Feliz
founder.bio1: Jorge Feliz founded Gen 13 Solar with a clear mission: to help homeowners, businesses, churches and nonprofits take control of their energy costs through honest advice, quality workmanship and long-term value.
founder.bio2: With a background in procurement, logistics and financial analysis, Jorge approaches each project from an investment perspective, not a sales perspective. Every system is carefully designed using professional-grade solar modeling tools so recommendations are backed by real data.
founder.bio3: At Gen 13 Solar, trust is earned through transparency: clear communication, premium equipment, meticulous design and support that continues after installation.
founder.bio4: Whether the goal is lowering electric bills, preparing for rising utility costs or investing in the future of a property, Jorge's focus is simple: give every client the knowledge and guidance needed to make a confident decision.
founder.verse: "Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters." — Colossians 3:23 (NIV)
cofounder.title: About Maximo A. Crispin
cofounder.bio1: It is an honor to be part of Gen 13 Solar and to contribute actively to the growth of a company committed to doing things differently.
cofounder.bio2: My focus is on providing personal, professional and transparent service, guiding each client according to their needs and helping them understand options that may contribute to reducing their electricity costs.
cofounder.bio3: At Gen 13 Solar, we share a vision of advancing a more sustainable future through personalized attention and support at every stage of the process.
solarPath.label: Choose your solar path:
aerial.alt: Aerial drone view of rooftop solar planning and design analysis
whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
